## Summary
Explain what this Pull Request changes in simple language.

## Area Owner
Which part of the project does this change?

- [ ] Backend/API
- [ ] Scoring
- [ ] Scraper
- [ ] X bot
- [ ] Frontend/UI
- [ ] Documentation/configuration

## Testing
Write the exact commands you ran, or explain why you did not run tests.

```bash
# example:
# cd backend
# python -m pytest
```

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit a real `.env` file.
- [ ] I did not commit auth/session folders or files.
- [ ] I did not commit `auth_info` or `baileys_auth` data.
- [ ] I did not commit local runtime JSON data from `backend/data`.
- [ ] I did not change payment, production database, WhatsApp broadcast, or deployment secrets.
- [ ] User-facing output still avoids accusation language such as "fake", "paid", "malicious", or "proven coordinated" unless used in a disclaimer.

## Screenshots
If this changes the frontend, add screenshots or write `Not applicable`.

## Reviewer Notes
Mention anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
